markdown:
#  View Projects from Your Free Procore Account 
##### Limited Release
[Free Procore accounts](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/create-a-free-procore-company-account) are currently only available in the United States and Canada.
##  Background 
Any projects that you are associated with in Procore are shown on the Projects page of your free Procore account. This is where you can view basic project information, see your current number of open items, and navigate directly to any of your projects in Procore.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Log in to your free Procore account.
  2. Click the **Projects** page.
  3. All active projects that you have access to are shown on this page. The following information is shown for your reference:
     * **Project Name**
     * **Address**
     * **Stage**
     * **Status**
     * **Type**
     * **My Open Items**
  4. _Optional:_
     * Use the **Search** bar or click the **Filter** menu to locate specific projects or filter the list.
     * Click a header name (Project Name, Address, Stage, etc.) to sort by that parameter.
     * Navigate to a company or project in Procore's web application:
       * Click the **project's name** in the Project Name column to navigate to the project in Procore.
       * Click the **Quick Links** drop-down menu next to a project to select a specific tool to navigate to in Procore.
       * Click **View Company** to navigate to the company's Portfolio tool in Procore.


## See Also
  * [Navigate to a Project from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/navigate-to-a-project-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [Navigate to a Company from Your Free Procore Account](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/free-procore-account/tutorials/navigate-to-a-company-from-your-free-procore-account)
  * [How can I tell if I have a free or paid Procore company account?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-how-can-i-tell-if-i-have-a-free-or-paid-procore-account)
title: View Projects from Your Free Procore Account
description: How to view Procore projects that you are associated with from your free Procore account.
